Research Incentives
RESEARCH INSTITUTE
Sri Eshwar has been recognized as Research Institute by Anna University.  Research Institute status further strengthens our commitment to research among faculty and student community and helps us play a significant role in mentoring and guiding more academicians to complete their PhD programs and join the research fraternity. As a Research Institute, we can accelerate our research undertakings and hence contribute to world-class research .
RESEARCH FACILITIES
Sri Eshwar is committed to investing in high quality research facilities that enhance the quality of research and bring out the best research outcomes.
